text.title: map-reduce-send-fanout Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for map-reduce-send-fanout as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Forgetting the reducer annotation on the aggregation field.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Parallel branches each overwrite the field, last write wins, all but one branch's result is lost. The Annotated[list, operator.add] (or a custom merge) is mandatory.

failure-mode.description: Using Send for branches that mutate shared external state (S3 manifest, DB row, append-only file).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Super-step atomic failure means partial side effects survive a retry. Use a queue + workers (SQS, Inngest, Temporal) for write fan-out, never Send.
